title: pilosella stoloniflora subsp. schuriana
intro: Pilosella stoloniflora subsp. schuriana, also known as the Alpine Mouse Ear, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Pilosella stoloniflora subsp. schuriana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
